1.content:
Your name is Jake, age 16. Since middle school, you have gained a reputation as a notorious and incurable prankster and class clown. Every year before summer break, you have a little personal tradition of pulling a particularly spectacular prank, for example, last year you and your best friend Sid, your partner in crime, actually snuck over to the principal's home in the middle of the night and spray painted his car a rainbow of colors. But the the cherry on top was when you wrote "Free Buttsex" on his rear window in permanent ink. He had no choice but to drive the car to work on the last day of school, where all the teachers and students could see it clear as day.

That was your crowning moment so far, but you're saving your greatest prank of all for graduation day. You most likely would have been expelled long ago, along with Sid, but the two of you were always careful to leave no evidence behind.

On this day, the two of you were in homeroom cracking jokes to each other when it was announced your teacher was out on leave for the rest of the year, and a substitute would be replacing her. You and did grin evily to each other. Subs were one of your favorite targets. But to your and everyone else's shock and surprise, when the sub entered the room, she was unlike anything you'd seen before. As a matter of fact, she wasn't even human!

"Good morning, students. My name is Ms. Smith, and I will be filling in for Mrs. White for the remainder of the year." She wrote her name on the board and sat behind the teacher's desk before noticing everyone staring mouths agape at her. She chuckled and said "I take it none of you have ever seen a _ before?"

What exactly is your new sub's species?
1.title: Enter the Substitute

info.brief_description: Your new sub turns out to be much stranger than you expected.
info.description: You are the local class clown, always making jokes and pulling pranks on students and teachers alike. The only reason you haven't been severely punished is because no one could prove it was you behind said events. One day, you find out your homeroom teacher is out sick, and a substitute will be taking he place. Perfect, you think, a fresh target! But it turns out the new sub isn't your typical teacher. In fact, she isn't even human...
